scene_input.scene_summary: The Muslims fall asleep, exhausted from the battle.
scene_input.key_visual_action: A group of Muslims are shown lying down, fast asleep, with peaceful expressions.

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 176
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of rest and rejuvenation after a challenging task.

characters.name: The Muslims
characters.appearance: modestly dressed in simple white thobes and brown cloaks, some with head coverings, lying down in a relaxed posture, peaceful expressions on their faces

schema_output.narrative_text: After a long and exhausting battle, the Muslims finally get to rest and recharge. They lie down on the sand, feeling grateful for the opportunity to catch their breath and refocus.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, open 7th century Arabian Desert battlefield with sandy terrain stretching out to the horizon. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sand, with a few scattered palm trees in the distance. A group of people, dressed in simple white thobes and brown cloaks, lie down in a relaxed posture, peaceful expressions on their faces, fast asleep. Soft, golden light, serene and calm mood. Medium shot from above, looking down on the group. Warm beige, golden, and light blue palette with the sandy terrain as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
